Class BackdropChangeEvent.Before

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.event.AbstractCancellableEvent
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.event.BackdropChangeEvent.Before
All Implemented Interfaces:
BackdropChangeEvent, CancellableEvent, Event
Enclosing interface:
BackdropChangeEvent
public static class BackdropChangeEvent.Before extends AbstractCancellableEvent implements BackdropChangeEvent
This event is fired before a backdrop is changed.
